label: Fireworks AI
description: Run hosted open-source LLMs and image models via Fireworks AI's fast inference API.

form.title: Connect Fireworks AI
form.subtitle: Paste your Fireworks AI API key to start running hosted open-source models.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from your Fireworks AI account. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Fireworks AI API Key

1. Log in to [fireworks.ai](https://fireworks.ai).
2. Click your avatar or account name in the top-right corner.
3. Select **Account** from the dropdown menu.
4. Navigate to the **API Keys** tab.
5. Click **Create API Key**, give it a name (e.g. `Anton`), and confirm.
6. Copy the key — it is shown only once. Store it somewhere safe.
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- If you lose the key, generate a new one and revoke the old one from the same **API Keys** panel.
- Keys inherit your account's rate limits and billing; create separate keys per application to track usage independently.
- You can restrict or delete a key at any time from **Account → API Keys**.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at fireworks.ai → Account → API Keys. Shown only once at creation.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you are using a custom or self-hosted Fireworks endpoint.

fields.name: default_model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: Model ID to use by default. Leave blank to specify the model per request.
